Soil/Rock Description: Angular COBBLES and GRAVELS of moderately decomposed granite with some clayey sand and some concrete fragments. (FILL)
Sub-rounded COBBLES and GRAVELS of moderately decomposed granite and tuff with some clayey sand (ALLUVIUM)

Moderately strong, brownish pink spotted black and white, moderately weathered to medium grained GRANITE with medium to widely spaced, moderately closely to very narrow, rough planar, biotite, chlorite and stained kaolin coated joints dipping 10°-20° and 70°-80°
